creator: dgilbert@velocet.ca
text:
Under 2.2.8, This machine (compaq Prolinea 1600) properly
shows two PCI busses (six slots, 4 onboard devices).  Under 3.1, 
only PCI bus 0 probes.

?
How-To-Repeat: 
	2.2.8: Works
	3.1:   Doesn't work
